name: Tooltip
description: Brief, supplementary message for an interactive UI element shown on hover/focus.

content.description: Content displayed inside the tooltip. Keep short and concise for accessibility.

status.description: Optional status controlling icon and border color. If omitted, status icon is hidden unless inherited from FormField context.

placement.description: Preferred position of tooltip relative to trigger. Uses floating-ui placement values and can flip/shift when constrained.

enterDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before tooltip appears.

leaveDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before tooltip hides.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when tooltip open state changes.

disabled.description: Disables tooltip rendering and trigger behavior. Useful for conditional display cases.

children.description: Single trigger element cloned by Tooltip to attach hover/focus/ARIA behavior.

aria: aria-describedby is applied to trigger and linked to tooltip content
Tooltip content should stay concise; rich formatting may not be conveyed by aria-describedby
Avoid attaching tooltips to non-interactive elements
Tooltip does not receive focus; focus remains on trigger
Only one tooltip should be visible at a time
accessibility.mobile: Tooltips do not reliably display on touch-only devices for links/buttons/non-interactive elements; form field patterns are supported.

avoid: Interactive content inside tooltip (links, inputs, buttons)
Critical instructions only shown in tooltip
Non-interactive trigger anchors with added tabindex
